title: DS Glass nominated for “Best of George” as business prepares for bold new chapter
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Just three years after...
bodyText:
Gallery
                            Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - Just three years after opening our doors, DS Glass has been nominated for the “Best of George” awards in the Professional Services category — a proud moment for a team built on hard work, quality craftsmanship, and a strong commitment to customer service.


> Founded in 2022, DS Glass began with modest beginnings and big aspirations. Growing into one of the trusted names in aluminium and glass installations, earning a reputation for excellence across both residential and commercial projects.


Photo gallery: “Best of George” awards:  DS Glass

From sleek aluminium doors and windows to custom balustrades, showers, and mirrors, DS Glass’ offerings reflect not only precision engineering but a passion for delivering aesthetically pleasing and functional solutions.

With nearly 20 years of combined industry experience, the DS Glass team brings together deep technical knowledge with a hands-on, service-driven approach. Along with providing reliable maintenance and repair services, we always uphold the same high standards that have come to define our brand.

Our mission has always been about more than just delivering great products. It’s about offering an exceptional, responsive experience from the first consultation to the final installation. We build relationships, not just windows.

The nomination for the Best of George Readers’ Choice Award is more than just recognition — it's a testament to the continued dedication to quality and professionalism.

Looking ahead, DS Glass is preparing for its next chapter. On 1 July, the company will move into new, expanded premises at 19 Tamsui Industria. This exciting development will also see the launch of additional services aimed at enhancing our capabilities across the entire Southern Cape region.


> Click here to vote: https://www.bestofsouthafrica.co.za/george/best-of-george-vote/


As we grow, one thing remains constant: a deep-rooted commitment to serving George and its surrounds with integrity, passion, and exceptional workmanship.


> Visit our website www.dsglass.co.za or email [email protected] for more!


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
